name: Zapier Automation
description: 8,000+ app integrations, trigger Zaps, run actions across Gmail, Slack, Sheets, HubSpot via Zapier's official MCP

env_vars.description: Zapier MCP API Key (generated after connecting apps in Zapier's MCP setup)
env_vars.how_to_set: zapier.com/mcp → Sign in → Connect the apps you want to use → Copy the API key from the setup page

tools.name: list_available_actions
tools.description: List all available actions across your connected Zapier apps. Each action represents something you can do in a connected service.

tools.name: run_action
tools.description: Execute an action in a connected app (e.g. send a Slack message, create a Google Sheet row, add a HubSpot contact). Each call counts as 2 Zapier tasks.

action_id.description: The ID of the Zapier action to execute (from list_available_actions)

instructions.description: Natural language instructions describing what to do (Zapier's AI maps this to the action parameters)

params.description: Explicit key-value parameters for the action (alternative to natural language instructions)

tools.name: get_action_details
tools.description: Get full details about a specific Zapier action including required parameters, available fields, and example values

action_id.description: The ID of the action to get details for

tools.name: list_zaps
tools.description: List your Zapier Zaps (automated workflows) with status, trigger app, action apps, and last run time

status.description: Filter by Zap status: on, off, or draft

tools.name: toggle_zap
tools.description: Turn a Zap on or off by ID to enable or disable an automated workflow

zap_id.description: The ID of the Zap to toggle

enabled.description: Set to true to turn on, false to turn off
